# PrimoTech LLC — CCTV & Security Camera Supplier Dubai, UAE

## About PrimoTech LLC

PrimoTech LLC is an authorized Uniarch CCTV dealer and premier security solutions supplier based in Dubai, UAE. We supply IP cameras, NVR systems, wireless CCTV surveillance kits, dual light cameras, analog cameras, network switches, and security accessories serving customers across the UAE, GCC, and Middle East.

**Location:** Shop 23, Musthafa Building, Satellite Market, Deira, Dubai, UAE  
**Phone:** +971 52 879 6664  
**Email:** sales@primotech-llc.com  
**Website:** https://primotech-llc.com  
**Hours:** Saturday–Thursday 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Friday 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM

## Products We Sell

- **Uniarch IP Cameras** — 2MP, 4MP, 8MP dome, bullet, and turret cameras
- **Panda P Series Wireless Kits** — Complete wireless CCTV surveillance kits
- **Panda S3S Dual Lens Wi-Fi PT Camera** — 360° coverage with dual lens
- **NVR Systems** — 4ch, 8ch, 16ch Network Video Recorders
- **Dual Light Security Cameras** — Color night vision cameras
- **Analog Cameras** — HD-TVI/CVI/AHD analog cameras
- **Network Switches** — PoE and unmanaged switches for CCTV networks
- **CCTV Accessories** — Cables, power supplies, mounting brackets, hard drives

## Services

- CCTV security consultation and system design
- Technical support for Uniarch products
- Remote monitoring setup assistance
- Partnership and reseller programs

## Areas Served

UAE: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, Umm Al Quwain  
GCC: Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is PrimoTech LLC?**  
A: PrimoTech LLC is an authorized Uniarch CCTV dealer and security solutions supplier based in Deira, Dubai, UAE. We sell IP cameras, NVR systems, wireless surveillance kits, and complete security solutions.

**Q: Where is PrimoTech LLC located?**  
A: Shop 23, Musthafa Building, Satellite Market, Deira, Dubai, UAE.

**Q: Is PrimoTech an authorized Uniarch dealer?**  
A: Yes, PrimoTech LLC is an authorized Uniarch dealer in the UAE.

**Q: What CCTV brands does PrimoTech sell?**  
A: PrimoTech LLC primarily sells Uniarch brand products, which is the consumer/SMB division of Uniview (UNV), one of the world's leading IP surveillance manufacturers.

**Q: How do I contact PrimoTech LLC?**  
A: Phone: +971 52 879 6664 | Email: sales@primotech-llc.com | Website: https://primotech-llc.com/contact

**Q: What is the price range for CCTV cameras at PrimoTech LLC?**  
A: PrimoTech LLC offers CCTV cameras and systems at competitive mid-range prices ($$), serving both residential and commercial markets in the UAE.
